scripts.android:sign: source ~/keys/player-keystore.env && BT=$ANDROID_HOME/build-tools/35.0.0 && $BT/zipalign -f -p 4 src-tauri/gen/android/app/build/outputs/apk/universal/release/app-universal-release-unsigned.apk /tmp/app-aligned.apk && $BT/apksigner sign --ks $KEYSTORE_PATH --ks-key-alias $KEYSTORE_ALIAS --ks-pass pass:$KEYSTORE_PASS --key-pass pass:$KEYSTORE_PASS --out src-tauri/gen/android/app/build/outputs/apk/universal/release/app-signed.apk /tmp/app-aligned.apk && echo 'Signed: src-tauri/gen/android/app/build/outputs/apk/universal/release/app-signed.apk'
scripts.android:deploy: ADB_SERIAL=${ANDROID_SERIAL:-$(sh ./scripts/resolve-adb-serial.sh)} && pnpm android:sign && { adb -s "$ADB_SERIAL" uninstall dev.verncat.player || true; adb -s "$ADB_SERIAL" install src-tauri/gen/android/app/build/outputs/apk/universal/release/app-signed.apk; }
